Hey guys, JB in the house, time for Throwback Thursday. Got an awesome clip for you here. So here's how we raise our standard. I want you to go to your section that you wrote for what means ultimate pain to you. And now, if you don't think your standard serves you, what does serve you? Write it down right now. Tell me what that number should be. Write it down. That's step one. And if your new standard needs to go up, write down the new standard. And I want you, give me a second to do that. So write down, for those of you especially who are too low, write down what your standard should be. And I want you now to write very quickly. You have a couple, just one standard, if it's for money, we'll do it just for money. You can do the rest on your own tonight. I want you to write down what is going to happen to you. I want you to take the pain that you've written down, your five things, and say, if I don't meet my new standard, I am going to feel this pain. I want you to link the pain of what matters most to you. And I want you to write that down. If I don't meet this new standard, I'm not going to feel significant. I'm going to start feeling, I'll be worried all the time. I'm going to have to write down the negative consequences here from your absolute pain to not going for your new standard. Everyone get that, yes. So do that very quickly. And I want you to write down what I've written down. I want you to write down the negative consequences here from your absolute pain to not going for your new standard. Everyone get that, yes? And for those of you who have a good standard, just make sure you do the same thing right down. If I drop my standard, I ain't gonna feel this, I won't feel that. I write down the negative consequences if you ever drop your standards. And as soon as you're done with that, I want you to do the flip side and I want you to write down your absolute pleasure. Whatever it means, absolute pleasure. Say, if I keep this standard, I am gonna live a life of my four greatest pleasures. And I want you to link what means absolute pleasure to you to your new standard. This is something, and again, I don't have a lot of time for this stuff. I'm just trying to give you a little taste of what it does with the intergame. You know, I just touch on here. Everyone, I want you to close your eyes, second, squeeze your hands together, say yes. I want you to, in your mind's eye, imagine your new, just want you to see your standard. I want you to picture your standard, like the number. See that standard. And then I want you to then focus on that number and make that number bigger. Move it closer to you. And I want you to transform that number into a picture of what your life looks like at that standard. What is your life like at that standard? How does that standard make you feel inside? Find the feeling and make the picture bigger and make it into a movie. Put it in motion and see yourself living your new standard in six months from now and a year from now. Three is, just let it roll forward. And see the picture. See yourself living the new standard and feeling amazing. And take a deep breath and squeeze your hands together and say yes. Yes. Louder.
